LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR PREJUDGMENT POSSESSION - TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501, THE REAL PROPERTY COURT, TO BE HEARD ON JULY 23, 2013 AT 9:30 AM. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE AND SERVE BY MAIL AN AMENDED NOTICE ON ALL PARTIES NO LATER THAN JULY 12, 2013 AT 4:00 PM. PLAINTIFF MUST COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B BY DELIVERING COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 501, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 12, 2013 AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.

Amended Ntc And Mtn For Order For Prejudgment Possession
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian F. Crossman, Deputy City Attorney of CCSF, (415-554-4690), for CCSF, Plaintiff and moving party / No appearance by Defendant and opposing party

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's Motion for Order for Pre-judgment Possession is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of And Mtn For Order For Prejudgment Possession; Ntc Of Deposit Of Probable Amount Of Compensation
Off Calendar Jul-19-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of And Mtn For Order For Prejudgment Possession; Ntc Of Deposit Of Probable Amount Of Compensation
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Continued To Jul-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's motion For Order For Prejudgment Possession - Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on July 23, 2013 at 9:30 am. Plaintiff must file and serve by mail an amended notice on all parties no later than July 12, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Plaintiff must comply with Local Rule 2.6B by delivering courtesy copies of the moving papers and Complaint to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 12, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/EHG)
